subcodes.first_line: My Most Exalted Pen beareth witness that thou hast turned unto God, the Lord of all beings, and hast attained unto the splendours of His presence and hast drunk from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد قلمی الاعلی بانک اقبلت الی الله مالک الوری و فزت بانوار اللقاء و شربت من
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
